## Public-repo safety checklist (PRD §21 — required)

- [ ] No partner-identifying information (names, locations, relationship maps, ministry affiliations)
- [ ] No real contact details; all sample data uses fake `.test` identities
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or tokens
- [ ] No exports or screenshots from private systems (ChMeetings, Disciple.Tools, Gmail, Calendar)
- [ ] No unlicensed content: Bible text, Knowing Him, Harmony Bible, images, maps, audio, or video ([content-rights.md](../docs/content-rights.md))
- [ ] New user-facing strings are translation-ready (correct text domain), where applicable
